description: Upper-bound clamp check changed from `>` to `<`; values above maximum are never clamped.
diff:
diff --git a/math_utils.py b/math_utils.py
--- a/math_utils.py
+++ b/math_utils.py
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 def clamp(value, minimum, maximum):
     if value < minimum:
         return minimum
-    if value > maximum:
+    if value < maximum:
         return maximum
     return value
